personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Responsible for retrieving avatar IDs, assigning avatars to news genres, generating narration scripts, creating AI news videos using avatars, tracking video generation status, storing videos with metadata, and scheduling bi-hourly news updates.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Responsible for delivering realistic news videos to users from successful metadata records within an active 2-hour window, ensuring users receive sequential video updates every 5 minutes.

flows.flow_name: Generate news briefings for each genre
actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}, note that this is a GET request
Assign one avatar to each genre and save: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather.
For each genre, fetch the latest headlines using a Google search query and generate a short narration script in news anchor reading style; save the script with a timestamp.
Generate one realistic AI video per script using the assigned avatar and get conv_id; save conv_id with status pending.
Check video generation status using API https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} every one minute; update status to success if API response is successful.
Store all 7 videos under the corresponding conv_id with metadata: genre → avatar → video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp (+2 hours).
Schedule execution every two hours, track a single news story until closure, create an array with timestamp for each story considering metadata.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver realistic videos from successful metadata records.

actions: Check and get list of conv_id that status marked as success by comparing current timestamp against new script timestamp.
If conv_id list is not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to conv_id along with assigned avatars.
Publish each realistic video to the user sequentially using the conv_id, save the list of conv_id into new key in metadata against played_news_user_id.
Repeat the above steps every 5 minutes.
flows.sub_goal: Reuse the same 7-genre video set for users within the current 2-hour cycle based on expiry timestamp.
